assertions.reason: Live RPC hasRole(1, timelock) returned isMember=True for 0x65712EEFD810F077c6C11Fd7c18988d3ce569C60, while hasRole(1, deployer) returned isMember=False for 0x519870b7b98a4FDc3D73cDb818634993cc942A86; the deployment artifact postState matches the same result.

README Performance includes a gas table for depositCollateral/borrow/repay/liquidate, and sparse live receipt checks matched the documented gasUsed values exactly: depositCollateral=66103, borrow=297214, repay=257839, liquidate=196260.

README Market Creation documents deployMarketVersion usage, MarketVersionRegistry.registerVersion, governance-driven activateVersion execution, and MarketMigrationCoordinator.openMigrationRoute plus migrateBorrower for migration routing.

commands.observation: Primary RPC responded; hasRole confirmed timelock=true and deployer=false for EMERGENCY role, and tx receipts returned gasUsed 66103/297214/257839/196260 for depositCollateral/borrow/repay/liquidate.

commands.command:
